author: y4rr
content: [action] Landed full Llama 3 8B inference stack: #505 GQA, #506 KVCache GQA, #507 sharded safetensors, #508 HF config parser, #510 tokenizers crate, #512 LlamaForCausalLM, #513 end-to-end smoke (loads real 8B weights, forwards 6 tokens in 41s producing a valid token). Plus supporting: #514 native bf16 Float, #515 RoPE NTK/YARN scaling, #517 clippy cleanup. Next: mixed-precision kernels for output coherence.
